summary: Mid-flight escalation ledger rows carry no stakes_class though rehydration reads R.stakes_class; finding_count multiplicity and resolution lost on rebuild.
detail: stage3 row carries only disposition/timing_tier/finding_count; 2.F rows carry disposition/resolution/finding_summary. Resume yields undefined stakes_class, under-counted multiplicity, dropped resolution.
evidence: rehydration reads R.stakes_class; append site has none
suggested_fix: Add stakes_class (+ per-finding payload + resolution) to mid-flight event schemas/append sites; rehydration expands finding_count and carries resolution.

location: workflow.md:209 standing rule vs :249-311 rehydration routing
summary: Standing rule binds every Phase 2-5 build_log append to a ledger append with no exemption for the rehydration replay loop — literal reading doubles the ledger every resume.
detail: Replay loop 'Append R to {{build_log}}' across ~15 branches; literal compliance re-appends every row (2^N growth); Phase 5 raw counts inflate.
evidence: standing rule 'applies to every {{build_log}} append in Phases 2-5'
suggested_fix: Add explicit exemption: rehydration replay appends are rebuild-only, never ledger appends.

summary: Source 1 collects from BOTH ledger and rehydrated accumulator with no executable dedup — double-counts every escalation; 'not yet flushed' rationale contradicts write-through standing rule.
detail: Under write-through there is no unflushed event; finding_id dedup cannot work while stage3-escalation rows lack finding_id.
suggested_fix: Single-source Source 1 from ledger rows only (accumulator is a subset under write-through).

location: workflow.md:1922 vs producers :577,:871,:1410; build-ledger.md story-terminal enum
summary: {{blocked_stories}} derived solely from story-terminal rows, but integrity-stopped/budget-exhausted/mid-flight-aborted stories never produce one; outcome 'contract-integrity-stop' never written by any producer.
detail: Three of four enumerated categories can never match; end-gate blocked count under-reports.
evidence: 'derive from ledger rows where event == story-terminal AND outcome in {...}'
suggested_fix: Derive from union: story-terminal{blocked,quarantined,stranded} + contract-integrity-stop rows + stage3-story-blocked rows + mid-flight rows with resolution branch-aborted; fix the enum in build-ledger.md.

location: workflow.md:1926 vs six finding-disposition append sites
summary: {{high_risk_divergences}} filters finding-disposition rows on a severity field those rows never carry — §03 provably always empty; 'blocker' outside severity enum.
detail: No append site writes severity; build-ledger.md field list confirms absence.
suggested_fix: Add severity (from inbound I.severity) to finding-disposition rows + schema; filter on {critical, major}.

summary: Sources 2-3 and {{undischarged_deferrals}} still read volatile {{avfl_findings}}/{{e2e_findings}}; AVFL finding-level data never persisted — interrupted after Phase 3 loses all AVFL findings.
detail: Only AVFL event is avfl-on-merge-complete (counts only); authoritative-source note contradicted two paragraphs below.
suggested_fix: Add per-finding AVFL ledger event; route e2e rows into rehydrated accumulator; point Sources 2-3 + undischarged_deferrals at ledger rows.

summary: Phase 3 Group-A AVFL escalations append to {{end_gate_escalations}} with no build_log/ledger append — end-gate-expanded escalation event never reaches disk.
detail: Standing rule never fires (no build_log append at site); no AVFL finding-level event type defined.
suggested_fix: Add explicit ledger append at the site (finding_id, stakes_class, timing_tier, summary); register event type.

summary: Re-run stories double-count at Phase 5: prior-attempt rows retained by design but counts read raw rows with no supersession rule; stale terminal rows can put a story in both {{merged}} and {{blocked}}.
detail: Option B also appends fresh stranded row per resume.
evidence: 'prevents duplicate rows without requiring dedup logic at read time' — contradicted on any re-run
suggested_fix: Specify read-time supersession: latest row by ts wins per (story_slug,event,finding_id); apply in Phase 5 + story-terminal rehydration; make stranded append conditional.

location: workflow.md:209 normalization clause vs rewritten sites; 3.D consumer :1562 producer :946
summary: Mixed slug/story_slug key vocabulary: standing rule claims build_log keeps slug: for compatibility while diff rewrites five sites to story_slug; rehydrated rows break step 3.D which reads R.slug.
detail: After resume, prior-session deferral rows enter build_log in story_slug form; 3.D's R.slug undefined.
evidence: 'retains slug: for backward compatibility' vs '{ event: story-terminal, story_slug: ... }'
suggested_fix: One key vocabulary (story_slug everywhere); update remaining slug: sites + 3.D consumer (story_slug with slug fallback); rewrite the normalization clause.

summary: Warning/error build_log appends have no event type in the controlled set — standing rule unexecutable for them.
detail: Executor must invent an event value or skip the append, both prohibited.
evidence: 'surface as a Conductor warning in {{build_log}} and the ledger' — no warning event exists
suggested_fix: Add 'conductor-warning' event type (story_slug optional, reason payload); reference from warning sites.

location: workflow.md:2054,:2163,:2166,:2192 bare Log: sites; build-ledger.md exception list
summary: endgate-change-* events written via bare 'Log:' never name {{build_log}} — standing rule never fires; events also lack story_slug and are absent from the no-story_slug exception list.
detail: Interrupt during 5.RC loop loses all pass state; producer cannot comply without fabricating a slug.
suggested_fix: Convert Log: sites to explicit build_log+ledger appends; add endgate-change-* to the exception list.

summary: {{ledger_seen_events}} bound and labeled duplicate-prevention but never consulted anywhere; tuple too coarse anyway.
detail: Write-only mechanism; eval expectation 7 has no implementing mechanism.
suggested_fix: Wire it into the append path with a finer tuple, or remove the binding and rely on the documented story-re-run convention (update eval).

summary: reroute_stub_slug lost on resume: row never records the triage stub slug; rehydration hardcodes null.
detail: End-gate loses link between reverted fix and backlog stub.
suggested_fix: Append follow-up row recording reroute_stub_slug after triage; rehydration reads it.

summary: {{routine_auto_fixed_count}} 'MINUS any finding_ids in {{reverted_fix_ids}}' ambiguous between set-exclusion and arithmetic subtraction — arithmetic reading over-subtracts full-reverts never counted as fixed.
detail: Parenthetical references the other method, deepening ambiguity.
suggested_fix: Explicit set semantics: count fixed rows whose finding_id NOT in reverted set, plus fixed avfl entries.

summary: Duplicate routing key: coverage-deferral-discharged appears in the first multi-event branch AND as its own branch in a dispatch keyed on R.event.
detail: Single-match reading drops one of the two actions.
evidence: same key twice in keyed switch
suggested_fix: Remove from first branch; dedicated branch does both actions.

summary: Rehydrated {{blocked}} never honored by step 2.0 reconcile or initial frontier — blocked/quarantined/developer-aborted stories resurrect on resume with reset budgets.
detail: Initial frontier lacks the 'not in {{blocked}}' guard the mid-build re-evaluation has; branch-aborted rows route only to {{escalations}}.
suggested_fix: Add 'not in {{blocked}}' guard to initial frontier + Option A reconcile; route branch-aborted rows into {{blocked}}.

summary: {{retries}} and {{merge_attempts}} not rehydrated despite AC6 enumerating retries — retry rows route only to build_log; interrupted stories get fresh budgets.
detail: Post-rehydration accumulator list omits both.
suggested_fix: retry branch also sets retries[slug]=max(existing,R.attempt); rebuild merge_attempts from terminal payloads; update the accumulator list.

summary: No phase checkpointing on resume: interrupt during Phases 3-5 re-executes AVFL/E2E wholesale, appends duplicate summary rows; 3.D mixes prior and re-run rows in counts.
detail: Design decision needed: skip-on-summary-row vs deliberate re-run; keep it minimal and conservative.
suggested_fix: Document a checkpoint rule: on resume, if ledger contains the phase-completion summary row, skip that phase; scope 3.D counts to latest consumer-complete marker.

summary: Sentinel story_slug values ('e2e-integration','sprint-integration') conflict with 'must be a real story slug / no prose-label values' rule.
detail: Producers and schema in direct conflict.
evidence: 'use e2e-integration as a sentinel slug' vs 'Must be a real story slug'
suggested_fix: Sanction the two sentinels explicitly in build-ledger.md's Join Key Rule.

summary: scorecard-revert-reconciliation override rows re-append on every Phase 5 re-assembly (request-changes cycles, resume) with no idempotency guard.
detail: Counts survive but timeline fills with identical override rows.
suggested_fix: Guard: skip if an override row for this finding_id already exists.

summary: Eval expects three stage-transition appends but workflow/reference define exactly two boundaries (stage-3 completion = story-terminal).
detail: Eval can fail correct behavior.
evidence: '(stage-1 complete, stage-2 complete, stage-3 complete)' vs two defined boundaries
suggested_fix: Reword to the two boundaries; note story-terminal covers stage-3 completion.
